package rulecoverage

func PositiveFirstOrCreateInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "first_or_create_in_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM FirstOrCreate(...) chains observed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
